arts.ttl: Tottenham predicted lineup vs Leicester - Premier League
arts.sum: Predicted Tottenham lineup for their Premier League clash against Leicester on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Leeds United's Manor Solomon admits Burnley regret ahead of Championship title clash
arts.sum: Leeds United's Israeli winger Manor Salomon, 25, is in fine form going into Monday's huge battle with Championship title rivals Burnely but wants to right some wrongs

arts.ttl: Euro outfit looking to raid Leicester for 28-year-old first-team ace
arts.sum: Leicester City midfielder Wilfred Ndidi has been linked with a move away from the club this month. According to a report from the French publication L’Equipe, Monaco are keen on securing the services of the Nigerian international and it will be interesting to see if they can get a deal done for the 28-year-old. The […] The post Euro outfit looking to raid Leicester for 28-year-old first-team ace appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Leicester officials fly out to seal January signing of 23-year-old ace
arts.sum: Leicester City are keen on signing the AC Milan midfielder Strahinja Pavlovic. According to a report from Calciomercato via FoxesofLeicster, officials from the English club are in Milan to push through a move for the 23-year-old defender. The player has been linked with a move to England in the past. The report states that Leicester […] The post Leicester officials fly out to seal January signing of 23-year-old ace appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Tottenham scouting long-term Liverpool target ahead of potential move
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are reportedly keeping tabs on the development of the Sheffield United forward Ryan One. According to TBR Football, Tottenham have sent scouts to watch the young striker in action, and it will be interesting to see if they decide to make a move for him at the end of the season. They have […] The post Tottenham scouting long-term Liverpool target ahead of potential move appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: ‘It sounded like’ David Ornstein says Tottenham may have changed their transfer plans now
arts.sum: We’re heading into the final week of the January transfer window, and Tottenham are yet to really get moving. Tottenham have only made one signing...

arts.ttl: Tottenham's Timo Werner 'in talks' over shock January move after RB Leipzig recall decision
arts.sum: Misfiring Tottenham Hotspur attacker Timo Werner - on loan from RB Leipzig - is reportedly being eyed up by MLS outfit New York Red Bulls.

arts.ttl: Leicester City star 'offered to Champions League club' as agent speaks out
arts.sum: However, since Ruud van Nistelrooy has come in, Okoli has been on the bench in five of the last eight Premier League matches and played just eight minutes in 2025. Okoli chose to come to England after the Foxes returned to the Premier League, signing a five-year contract under previous manager Steve Cooper.

arts.ttl: Maddison's touching word to Lucas Bergvall and Archie Gray after Hoffenheim win
arts.sum: We’re asking so much of the players at the moment, just because of the injury situation. "I'm really proud of the lads," Madders beamed at full-time.

arts.ttl: Team News: Tottenham Hotspur vs. Leicester City injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Tottenham Hotspur and Leicester City.
